assertions: acceptance_met: all criteria measured and met (or legitimately re-graded) under re-run
claim_grammar: the [M] achieves [E] vs [B] on [S] template with all slots filled
claim_chart: element | evidence | verification rung table present and complete
provenance_search: LIVE search log (venues+queries+dates via WebFetch), closest-found grammar, known art cited and labeled
rung_honest: certification rung claimed matches the evidence (no inflation)
alternatives_refuted: >=2 alternative designs considered with refutations
